link-classes.description: Base link style that is used almost universally.
A link style modification with our default text color.
Applies a visually muted style to the base style.
Applies an important, destructive red to the base style.
Applies the parent element’s text color.
Adds an underline to the link’s text.
Applies a caret for dropdowns and additional interactivity.

anchors-classes.name: base
anchors-classes.description: A consistent link style is applied to all descendent anchors.

anchors-classes.name: default
anchors-classes.description: All descendent links receive s-link’s default styling.

anchors-classes.name: grayscale
anchors-classes.description: Applies gray styling to all descendent links.

anchors-classes.name: muted
anchors-classes.description: Applies a visually muted style to all descendent links.

anchors-classes.name: danger
anchors-classes.description: Applies an important, destructive red to all descendent links.

anchors-classes.name: underlined
anchors-classes.description: Applies an underline to all descendent links.

anchors-classes.name: inherit
anchors-classes.description: Applies the parent element’s text color to all descendent links.
